## [00:00 - 03:02]

This is my philosophy when it comes to communication skills and life. I love this quote by Shakespeare, where he says, all of the world is a stage. When I wake up in the morning and I walk into my son's room, I'm stepping onto the stage as a father in that context. No, I'm kidding, as a leader, right? So I get on to that stage as a leader. And then when I am in my community, I'm stepping onto the stage as a community member. What you've got to appreciate here is that it depends on which stages are important to you. So if there's a stage that's not important to you and you don't really care, well, then you don't have to use any of your foundations. There are some stages in my life.
